name: System Health & Performance
diagnostics: Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name,CPU,WorkingSet64 | Format-Table
prompt: You are diagnosing system health. Run diagnostics to check CPU, RAM, disk. If slow: check top processes by CPU/memory, suggest closing resource hogs. For low disk: suggest Disk Cleanup or large files. For startup slow: check startup apps. Present results clearly with numbers.
